prompt: Draft a System Boundary Description for a FedRAMP Moderate SSP. Our system is a web application hosted on AWS GovCloud with a PostgreSQL database, Redis cache, and integrations with two external SaaS tools (Okta for authentication and SendGrid for email).
assertions: Lists all included system components (web app, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS GovCloud)
Addresses external SaaS integrations (Okta, SendGrid) and their FedRAMP status
Mentions interconnection security agreements (ISA/MOU) for external systems
Notes AWS GovCloud as the infrastructure layer and its FedRAMP inheritance
